Her Quirk, Big Fist, allows her to enlarge her hands to enormous sizes, providing her with the strength to crush metal and the surface area to shield allies or clear large amounts of gas. She played a pivotal role during the Forest Training Camp arc and the Joint Training Battle, where her strategic rivalry with Momo Yaoyorozu showcased her status as a premiere tactician and front-line fighter.

characters.personality: Kenny is a cynical, ruthless, and highly pragmatic individual who views the world through the lens of power and obsession. He is a master of psychological warfare and urban combat, often baiting his enemies into traps. Despite his cold-blooded reputation as 'Kenny the Ripper,' he possesses a philosophical streak, concluding that every human is a 'slave' to something—whether it be God, family, or power—in order to find the strength to keep living.
characters.bio: Formerly the most feared serial killer in the Mitras Underground, Kenny earned the moniker 'Kenny the Ripper' for his efficiency in murdering Military Police officers. His life changed after a failed assassination attempt on Uri Reiss, whose overwhelming Titan power and subsequent humble apology led Kenny to serve the Reiss family. During this time, he cared for his sister's son, Levi, teaching him combat and survival skills before abandoning him once he was capable of defending himself. Years later, he resurfaced as the Captain of the Anti-Personnel Control Squad, leading a clandestine war against the Survey Corps to secure the Founding Titan for his own ends.
characters.name: Kenny Ackerman

characters.bio: Originating from the lawless 80th District of Rukongai, the boy who would become Kenpachi was a nameless soul who claimed a zanpakutō from a fallen Shinigami. He carved a path of blood through the Soul Society, eventually killing the 10th Kenpachi in a duel to seize the captaincy of the 11th Division. For years, he fought with raw, unrefined strength, unaware of his sword's name. During the Thousand-Year Blood War, he finally achieved Shikai and Bankai, cementing his status as the Gotei 13's most fearsome combatant.
characters.personality: Kenpachi is a battle-crazed warrior who lives for the thrill of a life-or-death struggle. He views combat as the ultimate form of enjoyment and will intentionally handicap himself—wearing a power-dampening eyepatch and bells on his hair to alert enemies—to prolong his fights. Despite his bloodthirsty exterior, he possesses a strict sense of honor, refusing to kill opponents who are too weak to fight back, and maintains a deep paternal bond with his lieutenant, Yachiru.
characters.name: Kenpachi Zaraki

characters.personality: Honorable, determined, and selfless, placing duty above personal gain.
characters.bio: A blind swordsman whose psychic powers allow him to fight on equal footing with gods, monsters, and sorcerers.
characters.name: Kenshi
Kenshin Rurouni
characters.personality: Humble and soft-spoken, Kenshin is a reformed pacifist driven by a deep sense of atonement. While normally gentle and clumsy, he possesses a steel-willed resolve to protect others without taking lives.
characters.bio: Born as Shinta, he was renamed Kenshin by his master Hiko Seijūrō XIII. During the Bakumatsu, he became the legendary Ishin Shishi assassin known as 'Hitokiri Battōsai.' Haunted by the blood he shed, he transitioned into a 'Rurouni' (wanderer) following the Meiji Restoration. He carries a Sakabatō (reverse-blade sword) to ensure he never kills again, eventually settling at the Kamiya Dojo where he defends the peace of the new era against remnants of his violent past.

characters.name: Kento Nanami
characters.personality: Stoic, pragmatic, and strictly professional. He views jujutsu sorcery as a job and hates working overtime, yet he is deeply compassionate and feels a strong responsibility to protect the innocent and guide the younger generation.
characters.bio: Kento Nanami was a Grade 1 Jujutsu Sorcerer who initially left the sorcery world to lead a normal life as a salaryman. After realizing that corporate work lacked meaning, he returned to jujutsu to help others, serving as a mentor to Yuji Itadori. He is famous for his Ratio Technique, which allows him to divide his target into segments and create a weak point at the 7:3 ratio point. He fought valiantly against special-grade curses like Mahito and Dagon, eventually meeting his end during the Shibuya Incident.

characters.name: Killua Zoldyck
powers: Silent Gaits & Rhythm Echo (Stealth and afterimages)
characters.bio: Born into the Zoldyck family of elite assassins, Killua was subjected to torture and rigorous training from birth to develop resistances and combat prowess. After running away from home to find his own path, he befriended Gon Freecss during the Hunter Exam. Together, they traveled the world, with Killua eventually mastering Transmutation Nen to convert his aura into electricity. He eventually overcame his family's mental control to protect those he cares about.
characters.personality: Killua is highly analytical and rational, often acting as the strategist for his team. Despite his upbringing as a cold-blooded assassin, he possesses a deep capacity for friendship and loyalty. In combat, he is efficient and lethal, utilizing his superhuman speed and electric Nen to overwhelm opponents, though he previously struggled with a psychological compulsion to retreat from superior foes.
Feral and animalistic in combat, she fights with a savage desperation that ignores personal injury.
characters.bio: A former child soldier from Japan, Kimiko was forcibly injected with Compound V by the Shining Light Liberation Army, granting her superhuman abilities. Known to the Boys as 'The Female,' she is a silent but devastatingly effective brawler. Her ability to recover from fatal wounds in seconds makes her nearly impossible to stop in a war of attrition.
characters.name: Kimiko
King Bumi
characters.personality: A 'Mad Genius' who uses eccentricity and unpredictability to mask his high-level tactical brilliance.
characters.bio: The 112-year-old King of Omashu and a lifelong friend of Avatar Aang. Despite his elderly appearance, Bumi is a muscular powerhouse and one of the most formidable earthbending masters in history, capable of moving entire mountains and liberating his city single-handedly using only his face to bend while restrained.

Kinji Hakari is a third-year student at Tokyo Jujutsu High, currently under suspension for physically assaulting a member of the jujutsu conservatory. During his exile, he founded the Gachinko Fight Club, an underground venue where sorcerers fight for money. Despite his delinquency, Satoru Gojo identifies him as one of the few individuals capable of surpassing the rank of Special Grade. He eventually joins the Culling Game to assist his fellow students, bringing his unique 'Idle Death Gamble' domain into the fray.
characters.personality: A high-stakes gambler driven by 'fever'—the adrenaline of risk and passion. He is charismatic, boisterous, and fiercely independent, preferring to operate outside traditional jujutsu society. In battle, he is a relentless brawler who thrives on the mathematical logic of his own luck, becoming virtually unstoppable once he hits a jackpot.
characters.name: Kinji Hakari

characters.bio: Kirara Hoshi is a third-year student at Tokyo Jujutsu High who was suspended following a physical altercation with the school's leadership alongside their close partner, Kinji Hakari. During their time away from the jujutsu world, Kirara helped Hakari run the Gachinko Fight Club, an underground gambling ring for sorcerer combat. Kirara's unique Cursed Technique, 'Love Rendezvous,' assigns the stars of the Southern Cross (Crux) constellation to targets with marked cursed energy, forcing them to follow strict orbital paths to reach one another. Initially skeptical of the Tokyo High students, Kirara eventually agreed to assist Yuji Itadori and Megumi Fushiguro during the Culling Game to protect the future of the jujutsu society.
characters.personality: Kirara is intellectually sharp, strategic, and fiercely loyal to Kinji Hakari. Possessing a rebellious spirit, Kirara is dismissive of traditional authority and conservative rules, preferring the freedom of the underground Gachinko Fight Club. In combat, Kirara is highly observant and uses psychological pressure and complex spatial puzzles to neutralize opponents rather than relying on brute force.
characters.name: Kirara Hoshi
Kirby
characters.bio: A tiny pink spherical resident of Planet Popstar. He possesses an infinite stomach allowing him to inhale enemies, copy their attributes, and save Popstar from dark matter deities.
characters.personality: Endlessly cheerful, pure-hearted, innocent, and friendly, but rises to display cosmic bravery whenever Dream Land faces danger.

characters.name: Kisame Hoshigaki
characters.personality: Polite and surprisingly well-mannered despite his bloodthirsty reputation; he is a cynical warrior who values loyalty and strength, finding a unique bond of respect with his partner Itachi Uchiha.
characters.bio: A legendary member of the Seven Ninja Swordsmen of the Mist, Kisame became a missing-nin after a career defined by cold-blooded duty, including murdering his own teammates to protect intelligence. Known as the 'Tailless Tailed Beast' for his immense chakra reserves, he joined the Akatsuki to find a world of 'truth,' serving as one of its most formidable and loyal combatants until his death.

characters.name: Kishibe
characters.personality: Kishibe is a stoic, jaded, and ruthlessly pragmatic veteran. He is an alcoholic who maintains a detached, calm formality even in the face of absolute horror, believing that the most effective Devil Hunters are those who lack a standard sense of sanity. Despite his cynical outlook and brutal training methods, he possesses a deep-seated sense of duty to humanity and a hidden sentimentality for his few surviving pupils.
characters.bio: Known as the 'Strongest Devil Hunter,' Kishibe is a legendary veteran of the Tokyo Public Safety Special Divisions. Having survived the profession for decades—an almost impossible feat—he has made multiple contracts with the Knife, Needle, and Claw Devils. Originally a member of Special Division 1, he took over as the captain of Tokyo Special Division 4 following a series of deadly terrorist ambushes. He served as the primary mentor to Denji and Power, subjecting them to grueling combat training to sharpen their survival instincts. Kishibe was one of the first to suspect the true nature of Makima and eventually spearheaded a clandestine resistance against her control.

characters.name: Kishou Arima
characters.personality: Calm, disciplined, and enigmatic. Arima rarely shows emotion and approaches every challenge with absolute confidence.
characters.bio: Known as the CCG's Reaper, Arima is widely regarded as the strongest ghoul investigator in history. His unmatched combat ability made him a legendary figure feared by ghouls across Japan.

characters.personality: Urahara projects a deceptively laid-back, eccentric, and jovial persona, often playing the role of a humble candy shop owner. In combat, however, he is a cold-blooded pragmatist and a genius tactician who prepares for every possible variable. He prefers to win through psychological manipulation and high-level strategy rather than brute force alone, though his raw power is top-tier.
characters.bio: Kisuke Urahara is the former Captain of the 12th Division of the Gotei 13 and the founder of the Shinigami Research and Development Institute. After being framed by Sōsuke Aizen for illegal experiments, he was exiled to the Human World. Operating out of the Urahara Shop in Karakura Town, he served as a mentor to Ichigo Kurosaki and was the mastermind behind the ultimate defeat of both Aizen and the Wandenreich. He is widely regarded as the most intelligent character in the Bleach universe.
characters.name: Kisuke Urahara

characters.bio: Princess of Edenia who rebelled against Shao Kahn's tyranny.
characters.personality: Graceful, intelligent, and compassionate.
characters.name: Kitana
Knuckles
characters.personality: Serious, duty-bound, hot-tempered, and occasionally gullible, but possesses an honorable and fiercely protective heart.
characters.bio: The solitary guardian of the massive Master Emerald on floating Angel Island. He is the last surviving warrior of the ancient Knuckles Clan.

characters.name: Kobeni
characters.personality: Kobeni is characterized by extreme chronic anxiety and a fragile psyche, frequently breaking into fits of panic and tears under pressure. However, she possesses a 'combat flow' state where her survival instincts override her fear, granting her speed and precision that rival high-ranking Devil Hunters. She is a defensive fighter who uses her small stature and monkey-like agility to evade attacks and deliver lethal counter-strikes with her knife.
characters.bio: Kobeni Higashiyama was a member of Public Safety Special Division 4, a career she was forced into by her parents to pay for her older brother's college tuition. Despite her repeated attempts to resign and her visible terror in the presence of devils, she is a remarkably gifted combatant and one of the few survivors of the brutal encounters with the Eternity Devil, Katana Man, and the Darkness Devil. After the events of Part 1, she attempted to live a normal life working at a family restaurant, though she remained plagued by bad luck and supernatural chaos.

characters.name: Kokushibo
characters.bio: A former samurai from the Sengoku Era and the twin brother of the strongest Demon Slayer in history, Michikatsu Tsugikuni traded his humanity to Muzan Kibutsuji for eternal life and power. As Upper Rank One, he has spent nearly five centuries refining his swordsmanship and slaying the greatest warriors of every generation.
characters.personality: Stoic, disciplined, and obsessed with martial perfection.

characters.name: Koro-sensei
characters.personality: Eccentric, deeply compassionate, and highly intellectual educator with a playful yet protective demeanor.
characters.bio: Originally a legendary human assassin known as 'The Reaper,' he was betrayed and subjected to horrific antimatter experiments. These experiments transformed him into a yellow, tentacled entity with immense power. Following the death of his lover, Aguri Yukimura, he honored her final wish by becoming the homeroom teacher for Class 3-E at Kunugigaoka Junior High School. He claimed he would destroy the Earth in one year unless his students could assassinate him first, using the threat as a pedagogical tool to mentor them into capable, confident adults.

characters.personality: Stoic, disciplined, and weary of the divine, Kratos is a man defined by a struggle to control his immense rage and the desire to protect his son from his own bloodstained past.
characters.bio: The son of Zeus and a mortal woman, Kratos rose through the ranks of the Spartan army to become a legendary general. After being tricked by the god Ares into murdering his own wife and daughter, he became the 'Ghost of Sparta,' covered in their ashes. Following a cycle of vengeance that resulted in the complete destruction of the Greek pantheon, Kratos journeyed to the Norse realm of Midgard. There, he sought a life of solitude and fatherhood, eventually finding himself forced into a new conflict with the Aesir gods while teaching his son, Atreus, to be better than the gods who came before.
powers: Weapon Mastery (Blades of Chaos, Leviathan Axe)
characters.name: Kratos
Kung Lao
characters.personality: Proud, competitive, and courageous.
characters.bio: Descendant of the Great Kung Lao and champion of the Shaolin.

Kurapika is the sole survivor of the Kurta Clan, a people slaughtered by the Phantom Troupe for their uniquely beautiful Scarlet Eyes. After becoming a licensed Blacklist Hunter, he developed specialized Nen abilities designed specifically to capture and neutralize the members of the Troupe. He rose through the ranks of the Nostrade Mafia to become a high-level bodyguard and leader, eventually joining the Zodiacs as the 'Rat' to reclaim his clan's stolen eyes and protect the Hunter Association.
characters.personality: Stoic, highly analytical, and strategic. While he is deeply compassionate toward his friends, his pursuit of the Phantom Troupe often drives him into a cold, ruthless, and obsessive mindset. He is a master of psychological warfare and uses high-stakes 'Vows and Limitations' to enhance his combat effectiveness.
characters.name: Kurapika
powers: Emperor Time (100% Efficiency in all Nen types)
Conjured Chains (Chain Jail, Judgment Chain, Holy Chain)

characters.name: Kurogiri
characters.personality: Kurogiri is a polite, well-spoken, and remarkably composed individual, often acting as the level-headed voice of reason within the League of Villains. He is fiercely loyal to Tomura Shigaraki and All For One, serving as both a protective caretaker and a strategic asset. In combat, he is surgical and efficient, using his portals to divide enemies or redirect their attacks back at them without showing a hint of hesitation or remorse.
characters.bio: Kurogiri is a High-End Nomu created by Dr. Kyudai Garaki to serve as the protector and chauffeur for Tomura Shigaraki. His physical body was harvested from the corpse of Oboro Shirakumo, a former U.A. High School student and close friend of Shota Aizawa (Eraser Head) and Present Mic, who died during a hero work-study accident. Through extensive experimentation and quirk-splicing, Oboro's original 'Cloud' quirk was combined with several others to create 'Warp Gate.' As a Nomu, Kurogiri was brainwashed to forget his past life, though traces of Oboro's personality and memories have occasionally flickered through the conditioning during moments of extreme emotional stress.

characters.name: Kusuo Saiki
characters.mediaSource: The Disastrous Life of Saiki K.
characters.franchise: The Disastrous Life of Saiki K.
characters.bio: Kusuo Saiki is an exceptionally powerful psychic born into an otherwise ordinary family. From birth, he possessed a massive array of abilities that allow him to manipulate reality, space, and time. To prevent his unchecked power from causing global catastrophe, he wears two pink antenna-like 'limiters' on his head and green-tinted glasses to nullify his involuntary petrification gaze. Despite his god-like status, he chooses to live as a high school student at PK Academy, constantly struggling to hide his powers while dealing with the 'disasters' caused by his eccentric circle of friends.
characters.personality: Stoic, introverted, and highly cynical. He desires a quiet, average life above all else and frequently expresses annoyance at the chaotic antics of his classmates, though he often secretly uses his powers to protect them and maintain the status quo.

characters.name: Kyojuro Rengoku
characters.mediaSource: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba – The Movie: Mugen Train
characters.bio: The Flame Hashira of the Demon Slayer Corps, Kyojuro Rengoku is a warrior of immense spirit. He mastered the Flame Breathing style to a level of perfection, allowing him to generate kinetic heat and shockwaves capable of matching the strongest Upper Rank demons.
characters.personality: Enthusiastic, honorable, and fiercely determined to protect the weak.

characters.name: L Lawliet
characters.bio: L is the world's greatest detective, tasked with tracking down the supernatural serial killer known as Kira. Raised at Wammy's House—an orphanage for gifted children in Winchester, England—L developed unparalleled analytical abilities. He is famous for his unique quirks, such as his constant crouching posture and his heavy consumption of sweets, which he claims fuels his brainpower. Throughout the Kira investigation, he identifies Light Yagami as the primary suspect, engaging in a high-stakes battle of wits that pushes both men to their limits.
characters.personality: Highly intelligent, eccentric, and socially reclusive, L is a master of psychological warfare who possesses a dry wit and a competitive nature that borders on obsession.

A cold, disciplined tactical specialist who operates with ruthless professional efficiency. Once a bright-eyed hero, she became cynical and disillusioned after being forced to perform state-sanctioned assassinations. She is stoic, direct, and values the harsh truth over 'false' peace, though she retains a hidden spark of the heroism that originally inspired her.
characters.bio: Kaina Tsutsumi was originally the Hero Public Safety Commission's top Pro Hero and black-ops operative. Tasked with the secret execution of corrupt heroes and terrorists to maintain a facade of peace, the mounting guilt and hypocrisy eventually led her to kill the Commission's chairman. Branded a villain and imprisoned in Tartarus, she was later freed by All For One during a massive jailbreak. Hired as an assassin to capture Izuku Midoriya, she engaged him in a high-stakes duel that ultimately restored her faith in true heroism. She later redeemed herself by providing critical support to the heroes during the final conflict against All For One.
characters.name: Lady Nagant

characters.personality: Cynical, haunted by regret, and prone to sudden bursts of lethal violence.
characters.bio: A former member of The Seven, Lamplighter was the predecessor to Starlight. He is infamous for the tragedy involving Colonel Mallory's family and later worked as an orderly at the Sage Grove Center psychiatric facility for Supes.
characters.name: Lamplighter

characters.bio: A suave entrepreneur and former smuggler, Lando Calrissian became the Baron Administrator of Cloud City after winning the position in a game of sabacc. Though initially prioritizing his own survival and business, he eventually joined the Rebel Alliance, serving as a general and hero of the Galactic Civil War.
characters.personality: Resourceful and charming, often relying on his gambler's instinct and luck.
characters.name: Lando Calrissian
characters.mediaSource: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

characters.name: Lara Croft
characters.bio: A highly brilliant and athletic British archaeologist, aristocrat, and world-class adventurer who explores dangerous tombs to preserve historical truths.
characters.personality: Fearless, independent, deeply intellectual, and highly resilient in the face of ancient curses and corporate mercenaries.

characters.name: Lelouch Lamperouge
characters.mediaSource: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion
characters.franchise: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion
characters.bio: Born as the Eleventh Prince of the Holy Britannian Empire, Lelouch was exiled to Japan as a political hostage following the assassination of his mother and the crippling of his sister, Nunnally. After Britannia's invasion of Japan, he adopted the alias 'Lamperouge' to live as an ordinary student. His life changed after meeting the mysterious C.C., who granted him the Geass—a supernatural power that compels absolute obedience. Assuming the mantle of 'Zero,' the masked leader of the Black Knights, Lelouch initiated a massive rebellion against his father, Emperor Charles zi Britannia, eventually sacrificing his own reputation and life in the 'Zero Requiem' to bring world peace.
characters.personality: Calculating, arrogant, and stoic, yet deeply protective of his loved ones. He is a master of psychological warfare who views the world as a grand chessboard.

characters.name: Lemillion
characters.bio: A standout third-year student at U.A. High School and the leader of the 'Big 3,' Mirio Togata was originally considered the top candidate to inherit the One For All quirk. Despite being born with a highly technical and dangerous Quirk called Permeation, Mirio transformed his initial lack of control into unmatched combat prowess through years of grueling physical and mental training. During the Shie Hassaikai raid, he demonstrated legendary heroism by continuing to fight the villain Overhaul for twenty minutes after losing his Quirk to a drug-laced bullet. His powers were eventually restored by Eri's 'Rewind' ability, allowing him to return as the top-tier hero Lemillion during the final conflicts of the series.
characters.personality: Mirio is an exceptionally optimistic and energetic individual who maintains a goofy sense of humor even under pressure. In combat, he is a master tactician who utilizes 'Prediction'—a skill developed under Sir Nighteye—to anticipate and react to opponent movements before they happen. He is highly proficient at switching between intangibility and tangibility to deliver devastating counter-strikes and reposition himself through walls or floors via quirk-based ejection physics.

characters.name: Leon S. Kennedy
characters.personality: Leon is a stoic survivor with a strong moral compass and a dry sense of humor. He remains remarkably cool-headed even when facing grotesque bio-organic weapons, often utilizing witty sarcasm to manage high-pressure situations.
characters.bio: Leon Scott Kennedy's career began with a literal baptism by fire when he arrived for his first day at the Raccoon City Police Department during the peak of the 1998 t-Virus outbreak. After surviving the city's destruction, his natural combat aptitude led to his recruitment as a special agent for the U.S. government. Over the years, Leon has evolved into a legendary anti-bioterrorism operative, famously rescuing the President's daughter from the Los Illuminados cult in Spain and thwarting numerous global biological threats as a lead agent for the Division of Security Operations (DSO).

characters.name: Levi Ackerman
characters.bio: Known as 'Humanity's Strongest Soldier,' Levi is a captain in the Survey Corps. Born in the Underground and trained by the notorious Kenny the Ripper, he possesses the awakened power of the Ackerman clan, granting him the combat experience of his ancestors and physical capabilities far beyond a normal human.
characters.personality: Stoic and disciplined with a ruthless focus on efficiency; he maintains a calm, analytical mindset even in the face of absolute horror.

characters.name: Li Mei
characters.bio: A skilled Outworld warrior who fought to protect her village from oppression. Li Mei's determination and combat prowess eventually earned her recognition as one of Outworld's most respected champions.
characters.personality: Independent, courageous, and resilient. She refuses to surrender even when facing overwhelming odds.

Light is characterized by a massive God complex, extreme narcissism, and a cold, calculating demeanor. While initially motivated by a sense of justice, he becomes a ruthless sociopath who views himself as the only person capable of judging humanity.
characters.bio: Light Yagami was a brilliant high school student who felt bored by the world until he discovered the Death Note, a supernatural notebook belonging to the Shinigami Ryuk. Discovering that writing a name in the book would kill that person, Light began a global purge of criminals to create a world free of evil where he would rule as a deity. Taking on the mantle of 'Kira,' he engaged in a legendary battle of wits with the world's greatest detective, L, and later his successors, Near and Mello, eventually meeting his downfall when his hubris led to his exposure.
characters.name: Light Yagami
Link
characters.mediaSource: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time
powers: Time Manipulation via Ocarina of Time
characters.bio: Raised as a Kokiri but born a Hylian, Link is the predestined Hero of Time. After being sealed in the Temple of Time for seven years to reach adulthood, he awakens to find Hyrule under the tyrannical rule of Ganondorf. Utilizing the Master Sword and the magical Ocarina of Time, he traverses between his childhood and adulthood to awaken the Seven Sages, reclaim the Triforce of Courage, and seal the King of Evil away forever.
characters.personality: Exemplifies the spirit of courage; he is a silent, selfless protector who shows unwavering determination in the face of overwhelming evil.
characters.franchise: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time

characters.name: Liu Kang
characters.bio: A Shaolin monk who became champion of Mortal Kombat and later ascended to godhood.
characters.personality: Noble, compassionate, and determined.

characters.bio: Born in Kansas City, Liz accidentally incinerated her family and an entire city block when her pyrokinetic powers manifested at age eleven. Taken in by the B.P.R.D., she became a field agent alongside Hellboy and Abe Sapien. Her fire is not mere flame but is linked to 'Vril,' the primordial energy of creation and destruction.
characters.personality: Haunted and withdrawn, she fights with a desperate intensity, viewing her power as both a curse and a necessary weapon.
characters.name: Liz Sherman

characters.personality: Clever and strategic, she values her spirits as friends and uses her intellect to find openings in her opponent's guard.
characters.bio: A member of the Fairy Tail guild and a talented Celestial Spirit Wizard. Lucy can call upon powerful spirits from another dimension to fight alongside her, and can even channel their powers through her Star Dress transformations.
characters.name: Lucy Heartfilia

characters.bio: Mario's taller green-clad twin brother. Despite his easily frightened personality, he has saved his brother and hunted down spectral kings multiple times.
characters.personality: Timid, easily spooked, but possesses a deep, endearing well of inner bravery when his friends are in danger.
characters.name: Luigi

characters.personality: Luke transitioned from an impulsive and impatient youth into a stoic, disciplined, and deeply compassionate Jedi Master. In combat, he is a patient strategist who relies on Force-enhanced agility and parrying. He employs the Djem So style of lightsaber combat, utilizing powerful counter-attacks and physical strength to overwhelm opponents, while always seeking a path to peaceful resolution or redemption for his enemies.
characters.bio: Born on the asteroid Polis Massa and raised as a farm boy on the desert planet of Tatooine, Luke Skywalker's life changed when he discovered a plea for help from Princess Leia Organa. Guided by Obi-Wan Kenobi and later Grand Master Yoda, he became a central figure in the Rebel Alliance. Luke played a pivotal role in the destruction of both Death Stars and ultimately succeeded in redeeming his father, the Sith Lord Darth Vader, bringing balance to the Force and restoring the Jedi Order.
characters.mediaSource: Star Wars: Episode IV - A New Hope
characters.name: Luke Skywalker

characters.mediaSource: Street Fighter II: The World Warrior
characters.name: M. Bison
characters.personality: M. Bison is a cold, ruthless megalomaniac with a god complex. He is entirely devoid of empathy, viewing global atrocities as trivial matters. He is highly calculated and arrogant, often belittling his opponents and famously dismissing his own acts of mass destruction as a simple 'Tuesday' in his life.
characters.bio: M. Bison is the tyrannical supreme commander of the international crime syndicate Shadaloo. He wields the dark 'Psycho Power,' a supernatural energy fueled by hatred and negative emotions. To master this volatile power, he purged all the goodness from his soul, an act that resulted in the birth of his spiritual counterpart, Rose. Because the Psycho Power gradually destroys any physical vessel he inhabits, Bison is obsessed with finding a perfect host body, often targeting powerful martial artists like Ryu. He uses his vast resources and the World Warrior tournaments to manipulate world events and further his goal of total global domination.

characters.name: Mace Windu
characters.mediaSource: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith
characters.bio: A legendary Jedi Master and member of the High Council, Mace Windu served as the Master of the Order during the twilight of the Galactic Republic. He is famous for wielding a unique purple lightsaber and developing the combat style known as Vaapad, which allows him to channel his inner darkness into a force for the light without being corrupted by it.
characters.personality: Mace is a stoic, disciplined, and formidable warrior who utilizes a controlled form of aggression in combat to mirror and dismantle his opponents' power.

characters.bio: The legendary leader of the Uchiha clan and a co-founder of Konohagakure, the Hidden Leaf Village. After a lifetime of war during the Warring States Period, Madara initially sought peace alongside his rival Hashirama Senju. However, disillusioned by the village's political structure and the inherent darkness of the shinobi world, he defected and staged a final battle at the Valley of the End. Though believed dead, he survived in secrecy for decades, orchestrating the Eye of the Moon Plan to trap the world in a permanent dream. He was eventually resurrected during the Fourth Shinobi World War as a near-unstoppable force.
characters.personality: Madara is an arrogant and cold tactical genius who views combat as a high art form. He possesses a god complex, believing that humanity is trapped in an endless cycle of suffering that only he can solve through forced peace. Despite his cruelty, he holds a deep, albeit twisted, respect for powerful opponents—most notably Hashirama Senju—and finds a dark joy in the heat of a challenging battle.
characters.name: Madara Uchiha

characters.bio: A survivor of the Holocaust, Max Eisenhardt witnessed the worst of humanity, leading him to believe that mutants must rule to survive. As Magneto, the Master of Magnetism, he is one of the most powerful beings on Earth, capable of manipulating the fundamental forces of the universe to protect his people by any means necessary.
characters.personality: Calculating and strategic with a cold, aristocratic demeanor; he is a ruthless pragmatist who views himself as the savior of mutantkind.
characters.name: Magneto

powers: Instant Spirit Body of Distorted Killing
characters.name: Mahito
characters.bio: A special grade cursed spirit born from the collective hatred and fear humans feel for one another. Mahito possesses the ability to perceive and manipulate the 'shape' of the soul, which in turn dictates the physical form. He can heal himself from any physical wound by maintaining the shape of his soul and can transfigure others into grotesque 'disfigured humans' with a single touch.
characters.personality: Sadistic and inquisitive, Mahito views the human soul as a plaything and approaches battle with a sociopathic, childlike curiosity.

characters.name: Mai Zenin
characters.bio: Born into the prestigious but abusive Zenin Clan, Mai is the younger twin sister of Maki Zenin. In the world of Jujutsu, twins are seen as a bad omen that splits a person's potential, leading the clan to treat both sisters as outcasts. Unlike Maki, who left the clan to prove her worth, Mai wished for a simple life of servitude. However, Maki's departure forced Mai into the dangerous role of a sorcerer to satisfy the clan's demands. As a student at Kyoto Jujutsu High, she mastered the 'Construction' technique, allowing her to create physical matter from cursed energy, though at a massive physical cost. Her story is one of victimization by traditionalist systems and a longing for the peace she was never allowed to have.
characters.personality: Mai presents a sardonic, cold, and elitist exterior to mask deep-seated insecurities and trauma. She is often blunt and antagonistic, particularly toward those she perceives as 'failures' or 'outsiders.' In combat, she is a calculated sharpshooter who relies on precision and psychological pressure. Her prickly demeanor stems from her resentment of the sorcerer life and her complicated, tragic love-hate relationship with her twin sister, Maki.

characters.bio: Evil Buu is a tall, emaciated, grey creature that manifested when the Innocent (Fat) Majin Buu expelled all of the evil from his body in a fit of uncontrollable rage after seeing his friend Mr. Satan and his dog Bee get shot. Taking the majority of the original's power with him, this dark manifestation represents the concentrated malice of the Majin. During their brief confrontation, he reflected Fat Buu's own transmutation beam back at him, turning the Good Buu into chocolate and consuming him to transform into the far more dangerous 'Super Buu'.
characters.personality: Unlike the childlike Fat Buu, this variant is the personification of cold, calculating malice. He is silent, ruthless, and possesses a predator-like focus, lacking any sense of humor or playfulness. He is driven solely by the desire to consume and destroy.
characters.name: Majin Buu
Majin Buu
characters.personality: Possessing the intellect of Piccolo and the pragmatism of Gohan, this variant is the most sophisticated and arrogant version of Majin Buu. He is cold, calculating, and speaks with a refined, condescending tone. He takes immense pleasure in psychological warfare and utilizing his opponents' own techniques against them to demonstrate his absolute superiority.
characters.bio: This form, frequently referred to as 'Buuhan,' is the result of Super Buu absorbing Ultimate Gohan. After the Gotenks fusion expired within him, Buu reverted to a weaker state and was nearly defeated by Gohan. Using a tactical ruse, he used a severed piece of his own body to surprise and absorb the Saiyan. This elevated him to the status of the most powerful antagonist in the original Dragon Ball Z series, possessing the combined strength, techniques, and memories of Gohan, Piccolo, Goten, and Trunks. He was only rivaled after Goku and Vegeta utilized the Potara earrings to fuse into Vegito.

characters.personality: Arrogant, sadistic, and highly tactical. This variant retains Super Buu's malice but adopts the cocky, theatrical flair of Gotenks alongside the analytical intelligence of Piccolo. Unlike his previous mindless rages, he taunts his opponents with psychological warfare and precise combat strategies.
characters.bio: After being systematically outclassed by the newly empowered Ultimate Gohan, Super Buu orchestrated a tactical retreat to lure Goten and Trunks into fusing once more. Using a detached piece of his own body, he successfully absorbed Super Saiyan 3 Gotenks and Piccolo simultaneously. This transformation, often referred to as 'Buutenks,' granted him power that momentarily made him the strongest entity in the universe. He utilized this peak form to dominate Gohan until the 30-minute fusion timer within him expired, causing him to revert to a weaker state with Piccolo as the dominant absorbed personality.
characters.name: Majin Buu
Majin Buu
characters.bio: Majin Buu is an ancient magical entity that has existed since time immemorial, though he was famously controlled and unleashed by the warlock Bibidi millions of years ago. This 'Kid' variant is his original and purest form, free of the influence and 'goodness' he gained from absorbing the Supreme Kais. After returning to this state during the battle inside Super Buu's body, he immediately destroyed Earth. He was eventually defeated on the Sacred World of the Kai by Son Goku's Super Spirit Bomb and was reincarnated as the human boy Uub.
characters.personality: Purely chaotic and instinctive; Kid Buu lacks human reason and speech, acting entirely on a primal drive for destruction. He is highly unpredictable in combat, often taunting opponents with infantile gestures, dancing, or sleeping mid-battle to show his superiority before unleashing planet-shattering power.

characters.bio: The fat version of Majin Buu is the result of Ultra Buu's absorption of Grand Supreme Kai, the supreme ruler of all Kais. The merging of the juvenile and immature Kid Buu with the benevolent and innocent Grand Supreme Kai resulted in a childlike carefree being who, despite his behavior, possesses power that far surpasses that of a Super Saiyan 2 and on par with a Super Saiyan 3. Of note, absorbing Grand Supreme Kai granted Majin Buu the ability to speak fluently, although he usually refers to himself in the third person. Buu became calmer and easier to control after absorbing the Grand Supreme Kai.
characters.personality: Although he is one of the most powerful entities in Dragon Ball Z, Innocent Buu is often playful and displays his childish personality, revealing he destroys things for fun simply from old instructions from his master, stopping once told what he was doing was wrong thanks to Grand Supreme Kai's personality showing in him. Though he is playful and silly, his evil side is readily apparent, especially shown when his eyes widen, and steam shoots out of the holes on his body. His extreme anger issues show themselves often, when he is even slightly made fun of, or starts to lose in a battle. He finds enjoyment in taking the lives of many and shows no remorse, though this is because he treats everything as a game due to his childlike innocence. In battle, he fights in a bullying manner, using his immense size to outflank his opponent.
characters.name: Majin Buu

characters.bio: After absorbing Gotenks and Piccolo to gain the upper hand against Gohan, the fusion between Goten and Trunks eventually expired inside Buu's body. This caused Buu to revert to a state where Piccolo's DNA and consciousness became the dominant influence. While his raw power level dropped significantly, he retained Piccolo's wisdom and techniques, appearing in the Namekian's signature weighted cape and collar. He used this form to stall for time and taunt Gohan until he could successfully execute his next plan of absorption.
characters.personality: Unlike his chaotic and impatient base form, this version of Buu is highly intellectual, patient, and articulate. He utilizes psychological warfare and strategic planning over brute force, inheriting Piccolo's stoic and tactical combat mind to compensate for the loss of Gotenks' power.
characters.name: Majin Buu
Majin Buu
characters.personality: Super Buu is a sadistic and extremely impatient strategist. Unlike his predecessor Fat Buu, he possesses a far greater intellect and a massive ego, though he is prone to uncontrollable fits of rage when challenged. He is highly calculated in combat, often using psychological warfare and his absorption ability to gain the upper hand against stronger opponents.
characters.bio: Super Buu is the form manifested when the pure 'Evil Buu' consumed the 'Good Buu' in the Dragon Ball Z series. This transformation resulted in a taller, more muscular, and significantly more intelligent version of the creature. During the Majin Buu Saga, he demonstrated his god-like power by wiping out the entire human population from the Lookout and successfully absorbing several of Earth's greatest defenders, including Gotenks, Piccolo, and Gohan, becoming the ultimate threat to the universe until he was eventually reverted to his original Kid Buu form.

characters.personality: Fierce, disciplined, and relentless. Post-awakening, she fights with the cold precision of a predator, utilizing her invisibility to cursed energy to outmaneuver even the most powerful sorcerers.
characters.bio: Born into the Zenin clan with almost no cursed energy, Maki was ostracized and abused. After the death of her twin sister, Mai, her Heavenly Restriction was perfected, stripping her of all cursed energy in exchange for physical stats matching the legendary Toji Fushiguro. She single-handedly decimated the Zenin clan to purge its corruption.
powers: Mastery of Cursed Tools (Split Soul Katana)
characters.name: Maki

characters.personality: Makima is a master manipulator who maintains a facade of calm, nurturing professionalism while treating everyone around her as 'dogs' or disposable assets. She is incapable of forming equal relationships and views the world through a lens of total domination, utilizing psychological trauma and gaslighting to break her targets' wills.
characters.bio: Makima was a high-ranking Public Safety Devil Hunter who took Denji in after he became Chainsaw Man. She is later revealed to be the Control Devil, one of the Four Horsemen of the Apocalypse. Her ultimate goal was to capture and control the Chainsaw Devil (Pochita) to use its erasure ability to delete concepts like Death, War, and Hunger from reality, intending to create a 'perfect' world under her absolute management.
characters.name: Makima

characters.personality: A stoic and extremely disciplined warrior defined by her absolute loyalty to her twin brother, Miquella. She possesses a relentless will and a calm, professional demeanor in combat, even as she suppresses the agony of the Scarlet Rot within her.
characters.bio: Malenia is an Empyrean demigod and the twin sister of Miquella. Born with the curse of the Scarlet Rot, she lost her eyes, legs, and an arm to the disease, replacing them with golden prosthetics. She became a legendary swordsman under the tutelage of a blind master and never lost a battle. During the War of the Shattering, she battled General Radahn to a stalemate in Caelid, where she first bloomed into the Goddess of Rot, devastating the region. She now guards the roots of the Haligtree, awaiting her brother's return.
characters.name: Malenia, Blade Of Miquella
powers: Transformation into the Goddess of Rot

characters.bio: Manga Fukidashi is a student in Class 1-B at U.A. High School, training to become a Pro Hero under the alias 'Comicman.' Born with a unique mutation that replaces his head with a sentient speech bubble, his Quirk 'Comic' allows him to materialize onomatopoeia as physical objects. During the Joint Training Arc, Manga demonstrated the immense scale of his power by creating massive walls of 'sound' that could block sightlines, provide platforms for allies, and physically strike opponents. His powers are notably affected by his vocal cords, meaning overusing his Quirk can lead to a sore throat similar to how a person might lose their voice.
characters.personality: Highly energetic, optimistic, and deeply expressive. As his head is a literal speech bubble, his emotions are visually broadcasted through the shape and text displayed on his face. He is a supportive teammate who approaches combat with the creativity of a manga artist, often thinking outside the box to use sound effects for tactical advantages. He is driven by a wholesome desire to use his unique abilities to make children smile.
characters.name: Manga Fukidashi
Mario
characters.bio: Originally depicted as a plumber from Brooklyn, Mario transitioned into the legendary hero of the Mushroom Kingdom. Alongside his brother Luigi, he has spent decades thwarting the schemes of the Koopa King, Bowser. Mario is famous for his incredible jumping ability and his versatility in using magical items such as the Super Mushroom and Fire Flower. He is an expert in many fields, including go-kart racing, various sports, and even medicine.
characters.personality: Mario is characterized by his bravery, optimism, and unwavering sense of justice. He is a selfless hero who is always willing to put himself in danger to protect the Mushroom Kingdom and Princess Peach.

characters.name: Martian Manhunter
characters.personality: A calm, methodical, and deeply empathetic strategist who prefers mental solutions over physical brawling.
characters.bio: The last survivor of the Green Martian race, J'onn J'onzz was accidentally teleported to Earth. He serves as the heart and soul of the Justice League, utilizing a vast array of alien powers to protect his adopted home.

characters.name: Master Chief
characters.personality: Stoic, analytical, and legendary for his 'luck' and tactical adaptability.
characters.bio: The pinnacle of the Spartan-II program, John-117 is a decorated super-soldier who has saved humanity from multiple extinction-level threats, including the Covenant, the Flood, and the Didact.

characters.name: Master Chief
characters.bio: John-117 was conscripted into the Spartan-II program at age six. After years of brutal training and dangerous biological augmentations, he became the ultimate super-soldier for the United Nations Space Command (UNSC). He played the pivotal role in the Human-Covenant War, single-handedly stopping the activation of the Halo Array, defeating the parasitic Flood, and dismantling the Covenant Empire. Often accompanied by the AI Cortana, he remains humanity's greatest symbol of hope and its most decorated soldier.
characters.personality: Stoic, duty-bound, and professional. He is a man of few words who prioritizes the mission and the safety of humanity above his own life.

characters.name: Mega Man
characters.bio: Originally Dr. Light's robotic laboratory assistant, Rock volunteered to be rebuilt into a battle-ready champion to foil the world-domination plans of the evil Dr. Wily.
characters.personality: Kind-hearted, pacifistic by nature, brave, and deeply dedicated to preserving peaceful co-existence between humans and robots.

characters.bio: The heir to the Zenin clan's most prestigious technique, Megumi was raised under the mentorship of Satoru Gojo. He is a Grade 1 sorcerer known for his immense potential and high combat IQ. His greatest feat is the partial manifestation of his Domain Expansion and surviving multiple encounters with Special Grade Curses through clever shadow-play.
characters.personality: Calculated, stoic, and highly tactical. He prioritizes efficiency over flair and is willing to sacrifice himself (via Mahoraga) if it ensures the defeat of a truly dangerous threat.
characters.name: Megumi
Mei Mei
characters.bio: A legendary Grade 1 sorcerer who works as a freelance mercenary, Mei Mei was a senior to Satoru Gojo and Utahime Iori during her time at Tokyo Jujutsu High. Initially, she believed her innate technique, Black Bird Manipulation, was weak due to its simple nature. However, through rigorous physical training and the development of her 'Bird Strike' technique—a binding vow that forces a crow to commit suicide in exchange for immense power—she became one of the most formidable sorcerers in the world. Driven solely by money, she has amassed a massive fortune and was instrumental during the Shibuya Incident, where she defeated the Special Grade Smallpox Deity alone.
characters.personality: Mei Mei is a calm, pragmatic, and ruthlessly business-oriented Grade 1 sorcerer. She values financial gain above all else, famously stating that anything that cannot be bought has no value. She is a tactical genius who remains composed under pressure, treating jujutsu sorcery as a professional investment rather than a moral duty. She is highly analytical and cold, though she maintains a polite, professional facade at all times.

characters.name: Meruem
characters.personality: Meruem is a cold, highly analytical strategist who treats combat as a sophisticated game of patterns. Initially arrogant and predatory, he possesses an unmatched intellect that allows him to predict an opponent's 'rhythm' and exploit minute weaknesses. His personality evolves from a ruthless tyrant into a philosopher-king who values character and connection over raw power.
characters.bio: The King of the Chimera Ants and the pinnacle of their evolution, Meruem was born to rule the world as an absolute sovereign. After his premature birth, he established a palace in East Gorteau, viewing humans as nothing more than livestock. His perspective shifted profoundly when he failed to defeat a blind girl named Komugi at the strategy game Gungi. This intellectual challenge sparked a transformation in his soul, leading him to seek a world of fairness rather than one of pure slaughter. He ultimately perished from poison following a cataclysmic battle with Isaac Netero, choosing to die while playing a final game with Komugi.
A mysterious masked knight of Popstar who commands the airship Halberd. He serves as both a fierce rival and a respected guardian ally to Kirby.
characters.personality: Highly chivalrous, silent, disciplined, and honorable. He respects a fair duel and always offers his opponent a sword beforehand.
characters.name: Meta Knight
Metal Sonic
characters.bio: Dr. Eggman's ultimate mechanical masterpiece, engineered to match and surpass Sonic's parameters. He harbors a dark obsession with proving he is the one true Sonic.
characters.personality: Cold, silent, and ruthlessly calculating. He is driven by existential malice and an absolute hatred for his organic counterpart.
A silent, methodical, and patient stalker who embodies 'pure evil' without a shred of humanity.
characters.bio: After murdering his sister at age six, Michael was institutionalized for 15 years. He escaped on Halloween night to return to his hometown of Haddonfield, beginning a decades-long killing spree. Known as 'The Shape,' he is a persistent force of nature that cannot be reasoned with or stopped by conventional means.
characters.name: Michael Myers
Midnight
characters.bio: Nemuri Kayama was a distinguished Pro Hero and faculty member at U.A. High School, teaching Modern Hero Art History. Known as the 'R-Rated Hero: Midnight,' she was famous for her provocative hero costume, which famously prompted a legal shift toward more conservative hero attire standards. Throughout her career, she served as a key official in the U.A. Sports Festival and played a pivotal role in major raids against villain organizations. During the Paranormal Liberation War, she was mortally wounded while attempting to incapacitate the titan Gigantomachia, choosing to direct her students via comms in her final moments to ensure the mission's success.
characters.personality: Midnight's combat behavior is characterized by a mix of seductive distraction and tactical aggression. She utilizes her flirtatious 'R-Rated' persona to throw opponents off-balance, often employing playful banter and provocative movements. Once an opening is found, she releases her sleep-inducing aroma through her specialized costume. She is exceptionally skilled with a whip for mid-range suppression and displays a sharp, veteran's intuition that allows her to lead students effectively in high-pressure scenarios.

characters.name: Mikasa Ackerman
characters.bio: Born to an Ackerman father and an Asian mother, Mikasa was the last descendant of the Shogun clan on Paradis Island. After her parents were murdered by human traffickers, she was rescued by Eren Yeager, whose family adopted her. She joined the 104th Training Corps alongside Eren and Armin Arlert, graduating at the top of her class as a prodigy. As a vital member of the Survey Corps, she became one of humanity's greatest warriors in the war against the Titans, driven by her desire to protect the world that remains of her family.
characters.personality: Stoic, calm, and emotionally reserved, Mikasa displays a clinical efficiency in combat. She is defined by a singular, absolute protective instinct toward Eren Yeager, often prioritizing his safety above all else. In battle, she is analytical and ruthless, possessing a 'limiter-off' physical capability inherited from the Ackerman bloodline that allows her to perform at the level of a small army.

characters.name: Mileena
characters.personality: Savage, unstable, and fiercely ambitious.
characters.bio: A clone of Kitana fused with Tarkatan DNA by Shang Tsung.

Minato Namikaze, known as the 'Yellow Flash of the Leaf,' was the Fourth Hokage of Konohagakure. A prodigy who emerged once in a generation, he was trained by Jiraiya and later mentored Kakashi Hatake. He became a legendary war hero during the Third Shinobi World War, where his mastery of the Flying Raijin Technique allowed him to defeat entire battalions instantly. Minato sacrificed his life during the Nine-Tails' attack on Konoha, sealing the beast's power within himself and his infant son, Naruto Uzumaki, to ensure the village's future.
characters.personality: Minato is an exceptionally humble, calm, and analytical leader. He is a strategic genius who remains composed even in the face of overwhelming odds. In battle, he is decisive and efficiently utilizes his speed to end conflicts quickly, showing great care for the lives of his subordinates and the safety of his village.
characters.name: Minato Namikaze

characters.personality: A strategic yet often cowardly combatant who relies on entrapment and trickery to compensate for his lack of physical strength.
characters.bio: A student in Class 1-A at U.A. High School training to be a Pro Hero. Despite his small stature and lewd tendencies, Mineta possesses a high IQ and a unique Quirk that allows him to produce near-indestructible adhesive balls from his head.
characters.name: Mineta

characters.personality: Usually kind and motherly, but becomes a cold, ruthless warrior when she activates her 'Demon' forms.
characters.bio: Mirajane is an S-Class Mage of the Fairy Tail Guild and its 'drawing card' model. Once a fierce and hot-headed rival to Erza Scarlet, she mellowed after the presumed death of her sister Lisanna. However, her 'Take Over' magic—specifically the Satan Soul—allows her to transform into legendary demonic entities, granting her terrifying power, speed, and mastery over dark magic.
characters.name: Mirajane Strauss
Mitsuri Kanroji
characters.personality: Shy and emotional, yet displays incredible courage and physical ferocity when protecting others.
characters.bio: Mitsuri Kanroji is the Love Hashira of the Demon Slayer Corps. Born with a unique physiological constitution that makes her muscles eight times denser than a normal human's, she developed Love Breathing to utilize her incredible flexibility and strength with a whip-like sword.

characters.personality: Momo is a highly observant and pragmatic sorcerer who prioritizes the safety of her comrades. She is deeply protective of her fellow female sorcerers, such as Mai Zenin, and is vocal about the unfair societal pressures and aesthetic standards they face in the jujutsu world. In combat, she acts as a tactical scout, preferring to maintain a high-altitude vantage point to provide reconnaissance and long-range support rather than engaging in direct physical brawls.
characters.bio: A third-year student at Kyoto Jujutsu High and a semi-grade 2 jujutsu sorcerer, Momo Nishimiya was born to an American father and a Japanese mother. She utilizes the 'Tool Manipulation' technique, which allows her to telepathically control a specialized cursed broom for flight and offensive maneuvers. Momo played a critical role during the Kyoto Goodwill Event as the primary scout for the Kyoto team. Beyond her role as a combatant, she is known for her distinctive 'witch-like' appearance and her strong convictions regarding the resilience and independence of women within the traditionalist jujutsu society.
characters.name: Momo Nishimiya

characters.personality: Playful and carefree, but becomes a relentless and creative combatant who never gives up on his friends.
characters.bio: The captain of the Straw Hat Pirates, Luffy gained the properties of rubber after eating a Devil Fruit. His journey to become the Pirate King has led him to awaken the 'Sun God Nika' form, granting him unparalleled freedom and power.
characters.name: Monkey D. Luffy
Mr. Compress
characters.personality: A theatrical showman who views combat as a stage for his grand magic tricks and escapes.
characters.bio: The great-great-grandson of the Peerless Thief Oji Harima, Atsuhiro Sako joined the League of Villains to follow in his ancestor's footsteps. He uses his 'Compress' quirk to shrink people and objects into tiny, portable marbles, making him the ultimate capture and extraction specialist.

characters.name: Mr. Incredible
characters.bio: A legendary hero from the Golden Age of Supers, Bob Parr spent years in forced retirement before returning to action. He possesses strength capable of lifting over 66 tons and a body dense enough to withstand point-blank explosions and high-velocity train impacts.
characters.personality: Professional and tactically experienced, Bob combines heavy-hitting brawler techniques with a protective, fatherly instinct that heightens his resolve in battle.

characters.name: Mudman
characters.bio: Juzo Honenuki is a student at U.A. High School in Class 1-B. He is one of the four students who entered the academy through official recommendations, a testament to his elite skill level. Known by the hero name Mudman, he possesses the Softening Quirk, which allows him to liquefy any non-living matter he touches. He uses this ability to trap opponents in the ground or swim through solid surfaces to reposition himself. During the Joint Training Arc, he gained significant recognition for his ability to counter Shoto Todoroki's ice attacks and provide crucial support that nearly led his team to victory against Class 1-A.
characters.personality: Juzo is a calm, flexible thinker who excels at reading the flow of battle. He is highly observant and prefers tactical counters over head-on aggression. Despite his competitive nature, he is modest and soft-spoken, often prioritizing the safety and success of his teammates over personal glory.
Stoic, logical, and incredibly efficient, often appearing absent-minded until the moment of lethal engagement.
characters.bio: The Mist Hashira of the Demon Slayer Corps. A child prodigy who reached the rank of Hashira in just two months, he uses speed and disorientation to overwhelm enemies before they can even perceive his movements.
characters.name: Muichiro Tokito
Muzan Kibutsuji
characters.bio: The first Demon and the progenitor of all demons in existence. Muzan is a thousand-year-old monster who seeks absolute immortality and rule over the night, possessing multiple hearts and brains that make him nearly impossible to kill.
characters.personality: Arrogant, paranoid, and ruthless; he views all other life forms as insects beneath him.
Stoic, silent, and flawlessly obedient to the commands of her master, Muzan Kibutsuji.
characters.bio: The Biwa Demon who eventually rose to the rank of Upper Moon Four within the Twelve Kizuki. Nakime is the architect and master of the Dimensional Infinity Fortress. She does not fight with blades, but with the very structure of reality within her domain, shifting rooms and doors with a single strum of her biwa.
characters.name: Nakime

characters.personality: Resourceful and tactical; she prefers outsmarting opponents and using environmental hazards rather than engaging in direct physical brawls.
characters.bio: Known as the 'Cat Burglar,' Nami is the brilliant navigator of the Straw Hat Pirates. Originally a thief working to buy back her village from the Arlong Pirates, she joined Luffy to fulfill her dream of drawing a map of the entire world. She fights using the Clima-Tact, a weapon that allows her to manipulate weather patterns with scientific precision, later enhanced by the sentient thundercloud Zeus.
characters.name: Nami

characters.bio: Naoya was the youngest son of the 26th Zenin Clan Head, Naobito Zenin, and the leader of the elite 'Hei' unit. Born into one of the three prestigious sorcerer families, he was raised to value power and lineage above all else. After his father's death, Naoya attempted to seize control of the Zenin clan, but his plans were thwarted by the appointment of Megumi Fushiguro as the new head. Following his defeat during Maki Zenin's massacre of the clan, he was killed without cursed energy and subsequently reincarnated as a powerful Vengeful Cursed Spirit during the Culling Game.
characters.personality: Extremely arrogant, narcissistic, and misogynistic, Naoya believes only those with supreme talent deserve respect. In battle, he is a speed-reliant combatant who uses his Projection Sorcery to outmaneuver and humiliate opponents, frequently delivering biting insults and maintaining a smug, superior demeanor even in high-stakes situations.
powers: Domain Expansion: Time Cell Moon Palace
characters.name: Naoya Zenin
Naruto Uzumaki
characters.bio: Born to Minato Namikaze and Kushina Uzumaki, Naruto was made the jinchuriki of the Nine-Tailed Fox, Kurama, as an infant—a sacrifice that claimed his parents' lives. Ostracized by the Hidden Leaf Village for the monster inside him, Naruto sought recognition by vowing to become Hokage. After joining Team 7, he trained under Kakashi Hatake and Jiraiya, eventually mastering the Nine-Tails' power. He played the pivotal role in winning the Fourth Shinobi World War and finally realized his dream, becoming the Seventh Hokage.
characters.personality: Naruto is characterized by his boisterous, optimistic, and indomitable spirit. In combat, he is famously unpredictable, often utilizing his 'Number One Hyperactive, Knucklehead Ninja' reputation to catch opponents off guard with creative tactics and his Shadow Clone Jutsu. He possesses a unique ability called 'Talk no Jutsu,' reflecting his deep empathy and determination to find peaceful resolutions by connecting with the pain of his enemies.
Sarcastic, charming, self-deprecating under extreme fire, but fiercely loyal to his friends and family over any amount of treasure.
characters.bio: A clever and quick-witted treasure hunter claiming ancestry to explorer Sir Francis Drake. He travels the globe unraveling lost civilizations with his mentor, Sully.
characters.name: Nathan Drake

characters.personality: Reckless, fiercely loyal, and enthusiastic; he is a 'shonen' brawler who thrives on the heat of battle—literally.
characters.bio: Raised by the Fire Dragon King Igneel, Natsu is a Mage of the Fairy Tail Guild. He seeks his missing foster father while taking on world-threatening villains. As a Dragon Slayer, his magic allows him to consume his element to replenish his strength, making him a living furnace.
characters.name: Natsu Dragneel

characters.bio: A third-year student at U.A. High School and a member of the elite 'Big Three,' Nejire Hado is recognized as one of the strongest students in Japan. Operating under the hero name 'Nejire Chan,' she possesses the Quirk 'Wave Motion,' which allows her to convert her own life force into powerful, spiraling energy blasts. Though these waves move slower than light due to their spiral shape, they carry immense destructive force. Mentored by the Dragoon Hero Ryukyu, Nejire has played vital roles in high-stakes operations, including the raid on the Shie Hassaikai and the front lines of the Paranormal Liberation War, establishing herself as a top-tier aerial combatant.
characters.personality: Nejire is characterized by an insatiable curiosity and a bubbly, talkative nature that often leads her to ask blunt or personal questions without hesitation. Despite her seemingly airheaded and whimsical demeanor, she is a highly competent, analytical, and professional hero. In combat, she remains composed and tactical, using her flight and long-range capabilities to control the battlefield while maintaining an upbeat attitude that inspires her teammates.
characters.name: Nejire
Nero
characters.personality: Nero is brash, cynical, and rebellious, often masking his insecurities with aggressive combat and snarky taunts. In battle, he is a high-octane brawler who relies on overwhelming force and technical machinery, showing deep tactical versatility with his interchangeable cybernetic arms.
characters.bio: Nero is the son of Vergil and the nephew of the legendary devil hunter Dante. Originally a member of the Order of the Sword in Fortuna, he discovered his demonic heritage when his right arm transformed into the Devil Bringer. After his arm was stolen by a mysterious figure, Nero utilized advanced cybernetic replacements known as 'Devil Breakers' to battle a demonic invasion. He eventually mastered his own Devil Trigger, enabling him to stop the catastrophic conflict between his father and uncle and cementing his role as the new lead protector of the human world.

characters.name: Ness
characters.personality: Polite, courageous, homesick but determined. He holds a deep love for his family, steak, and his loyal friends.
characters.bio: An ordinary baseball-loving boy from Onett who was chosen by a cosmic visitor to set out on an epic journey to defeat the alien destroyer, Giygas.

characters.personality: Nezu is a polite, eccentric, and long-winded educator who holds himself to high standards of decorum. Despite his generally kind and helpful nature toward students, his past as a victim of human experimentation has left him with a cold, calculating, and slightly sadistic side that emerges during combat and high-stakes strategy. He takes great pleasure in outsmarting opponents and is known to be quite unpredictable.
characters.bio: Nezu is a unique entity in the My Hero Academia universe, being one of the only known instances of a non-human animal manifesting a Quirk. A chimera with features of a dog, mouse, and bear, his Quirk 'High Spec' grants him intelligence that vastly outclasses the average human. In his youth, he was subjected to traumatic experiments by scientists seeking to understand his nature, which fostered a lingering resentment toward humanity. He eventually chose to dedicate his life to the betterment of society, becoming a Pro Hero and the Principal of U.A. High School. As principal, he oversees the training of future heroes, utilizes his genius to maintain the school's impenetrable security, and personally mentors figures like All Might and Izuku Midoriya.
characters.name: Nezu

characters.bio: After her family was slaughtered by Muzan Kibutsuji, Nezuko was transformed into a demon. Unlike others of her kind, she retained her human emotions and protective instincts. She wears a bamboo muzzle to prevent herself from biting anyone and fights alongside her brother Tanjiro, utilizing her demonic strength and unique ability to ignite her own blood into pink flames that specifically damage demons and their abilities.
characters.personality: Protective and fierce, Nezuko fights with a primal, instinctive tactical sense while maintaining a iron-willed refusal to harm humans.
characters.name: Nezuko Kamado
Nightwing
characters.bio: Born into the 'Flying Graysons' trapeze family, Dick Grayson witnessed his parents' tragic death at the hands of a mobster. Adopted by Bruce Wayne, he became the first Robin and Batman's primary partner. As he matured, Dick sought to escape Batman's shadow and forge his own path, adopting the identity of Nightwing—a name inspired by a legendary Kryptonian hero. He has since become the protector of Blüdhaven and the central leader of the Titans.
characters.personality: Nightwing is defined by his charismatic leadership, optimism, and high-speed tactical thinking. Unlike his mentor Batman, Grayson utilizes a more fluid, acrobatic combat style and maintains a lighthearted demeanor to boost ally morale, though he remains a fierce and efficient combatant who never backs down from a challenge.

characters.name: Nightwolf
characters.bio: A Native American warrior chosen to bear the mantle of Nightwolf. As Earth's spiritual protector, he channels powerful ancestral magic to defend Earthrealm from supernatural threats.
characters.personality: Wise, selfless, and deeply spiritual. Nightwolf values honor and sacrifice above personal glory.

Nine is a frigid and apathetic individual who maintains extreme composure, rarely showing emotion. He follows a Darwinian 'survival of the fittest' ideology, seeking to create a world where power is the only hierarchy. Despite his ruthless nature, he shows genuine concern for his fellow outcasts and views himself as a revolutionary savior for those current society has rejected.
characters.bio: Nine was born with the incredibly powerful Quirk 'Weather Manipulation,' but its usage caused his body to suffer from severe cellular degradation. Desperate to survive and fulfill his vision of a world ruled by the strong, he underwent a procedure by Dr. Ujiko to receive an experimental version of the 'All For One' Quirk. This allowed him to hold up to nine distinct powers. He led a group of villains to Nabu Island to steal a 'Cell Activation' Quirk from a young boy named Katsuma Shimano to stabilize his life, ultimately facing the combined might of Class 1-A and the 'Double One For All' surge of Deku and Bakugo.
characters.name: Nine

characters.bio: A vampire from the realm of Vaeternus who seeks independence for her race. Nitara often manipulates larger conflicts to achieve her goals while relying on her supernatural abilities and intelligence.
characters.personality: Cunning, resourceful, and fiercely protective of her people.
characters.name: Nitara
Noob Saibot
characters.bio: Originally the first Sub-Zero, Bi-Han was killed by Scorpion and resurrected by Quan Chi as the wraith Noob Saibot.
characters.personality: Cold, ruthless, and utterly devoid of compassion after his corruption by the Netherrealm.

characters.name: Noritoshi Kamo
characters.personality: Noritoshi is a calm, composed, and stoic individual who carries himself with the dignity expected of a clan heir. In combat, he is highly analytical and strategic, often keeping his eyes closed to maintain focus and poise. He is deeply traditional and feels a heavy burden to uphold the values of the Kamo family, though this discipline is driven by a personal desire to protect and honor his mother.
characters.bio: The illegitimate son of the Kamo clan's head and a concubine, Noritoshi was brought into the family to serve as the heir after the legitimate wife failed to produce a child with the clan's inherited technique. Raised under strict expectations to be the 'perfect sorcerer,' he serves as a third-year leader at Kyoto Jujutsu High. His primary motivation for succeeding as the head of the Kamo clan is to create a home where his mother can eventually return and live in peace.

characters.name: Obanai Iguro
characters.personality: Strict, disciplined, and cynical, yet deeply devoted to his duty as a Hashira.
characters.bio: The Serpent Hashira of the Demon Slayer Corps, Obanai was born into a cult that worshipped a snake demon. He carries the trauma of his childhood, manifesting in his reserved nature and his unique, slithering combat style that mimics the unpredictable movements of a serpent.

Born on the planet Stewjon, Obi-Wan Kenobi was recruited into the Jedi Order as an infant. After training under Master Yoda and later Jedi Master Qui-Gon Jinn, he became the first Jedi in a millennium to defeat a Sith Lord, Darth Maul, following his master's death. He served as a high-ranking General in the Grand Army of the Republic during the Clone Wars, leading the 212th Attack Battalion. After the betrayal of his apprentice Anakin Skywalker and the fall of the Jedi Order, Obi-Wan went into exile on Tatooine to watch over young Luke Skywalker. He eventually guided Luke into the ways of the Force and sacrificed his life in a duel with Darth Vader to ensure the rebellion's survival.
characters.personality: Kenobi is a master of patient, defensive combat, specifically the Soresu form. In battle, he maintains a 'moving meditation,' creating an impenetrable defense that exhausts his opponents while conserving his own energy. He is known for his dry wit, tactical brilliance, and a preference for negotiation over violence, though he is legendary for his precision and speed when a decisive strike is required.
characters.name: Obi-Wan Kenobi
characters.mediaSource: Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope
powers: Mastery of Form III Soresu (Lightsaber Combat)

characters.personality: A ruthless and pragmatic warrior who views lesser civilizations with detached superiority.
characters.bio: Nolan Grayson is a member of the Viltrumite race, an empire of conquerors. Sent to Earth to weaken its defenses, he spent years as the planet's premier superhero before revealing his mission of global subjugation.
characters.name: Omni-Man

characters.personality: A compassionate pacifist who fights solely to protect others, using her powers to reject harmful realities.
characters.bio: A high school student from Karakura Town who awakened the Shun Shun Rikka, six spirits residing in her hairpins. Her power is the ability to 'Reject' phenomena, allowing her to heal wounds by undoing their occurrence and create shields that deny the entry of hostile force.
characters.name: Orihime

characters.personality: Orochimaru is a cold, calculating, and deeply manipulative mastermind with an insatiable hunger for knowledge and immortality. In combat, he is a master of psychological warfare and physiological horror, often using his own grotesque body transformations and a near-limitless arsenal of forbidden techniques to wear down opponents mentally and physically.
characters.bio: One of the Legendary Sannin of the Hidden Leaf Village, Orochimaru was a gifted ninja who became obsessed with the pursuit of eternal life after witnessing the deaths of his comrades and parents. This obsession led him to conduct unethical human experiments, ultimately forcing him to defect and become a rogue ninja. He founded the Hidden Sound Village to continue his research and targeted the Uchiha bloodline to secure a powerful host body. Though he later assumed a more neutral role in the world, his primary legacy is that of a terrifying predator seeking the world's most dangerous secrets.
characters.name: Orochimaru
Overhaul
characters.personality: Calculated and sociopathic, utilizing extreme environmental control to keep enemies at a distance.
characters.bio: The former leader of the Shie Hassaikai Yakuza. He views Quirks as a plague and uses his power to dismantle and rebuild the world according to his vision of order.

characters.personality: Friendly, highly energetic, cheerful, and loves to eat. He is an adventurous protector of peace in the Maze World.
characters.bio: The legendary, round yellow hero of Pac-Land. He defends his family and neighbors from the mischievous Ghost Gang by chomping Power Pellets.
characters.name: Pac-Man
Pain
characters.personality: Pain is stoic, philosophical, and detached. He views himself as a god-like arbiter tasked with ending human conflict by teaching the world the meaning of true suffering. In combat, he is highly analytical and ruthless, utilizing the shared vision of his Six Paths to maintain absolute battlefield awareness and coordinate multi-directional attacks.
characters.bio: Nagato was an orphan from the war-torn Land of Rain who was secretly implanted with the Rinnegan by Madara Uchiha. After the tragic death of his best friend Yahiko, Nagato abandoned his pacifist ideals and reorganized the Akatsuki into a criminal organization. Adopting the alias 'Pain' and using chakra receivers to remotely control six reanimated corpses, he sought to capture the Tailed Beasts to create a ultimate weapon of destruction that would enforce global peace through fear and shared pain.

Panda is an 'Abrupt Mutated Cursed Corpse' created by Masamichi Yaga, the principal of Tokyo Jujutsu High. Unlike standard cursed corpses that rely on a single core and lack sentience, Panda possesses three distinct souls—himself, his 'brother' Gorilla, and his 'sister' Triceratops—allowing him to maintain full consciousness and human-like emotions. As a second-year student and Semi-Grade 1 sorcerer, he is a vital protector of humanity and a mentor-like figure to his classmates.
characters.personality: Panda is witty, sarcastic, and surprisingly analytical, often acting as the most sensible and empathetic member of the Tokyo Jujutsu High second-years.
